title: Arcadeología
overview: Who is in charge of preserving the legacy of video games? Arcadeology follows the passing of experts who, at the expense of the Valencian Arcade Vintage association, are trying to recover our digital heritage and are responsible for the creation of the most filled museum of video games in Spain, Ibi (Alicante).
